title: Rutley, David - Minister for the Americas, Caribbean and the Overseas Territories, Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Rutley left his role at the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office in July 2024.  Advisor, Mountain Training Trust Mr Rutley sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the Mountain Training Trust. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in April 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Trustee, The Rossendale Trust Mr Rutley sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with The Rossendale Trust. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Governor, Macclesfield College   Mr Rutley sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Macclesfield College. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in November 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.’ "
